summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are emitted; #49511 is quarantined to central security handling, overlapping SecretRef docs PRs are kept related, and the remaining active PRs are kept for normal maintainer or author follow-up.

actions.reason: Active non-security Claude CLI/message-delivery PR with useful code and proof; keep in the related maintainer-review backlog rather than close or merge from this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned broad QA PR should stay outside dedupe cleanup.
Useful active UI fix with maintainer follow-up; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this shard.
Open Slack behavior PR has unresolved proof requirements; keep it for author or maintainer follow-up rather than close.
Keep as an active related SecretRef docs candidate; no merge or close is planned from this inventory shard.
Active non-security Claude CLI fix with passing proof and maintainer-review status; keep related, no merge in plan mode.
Keep as related candidate fix for #87387; validation and maintainer review should remain on the PR.
Related overlapping SecretRef docs PR with unresolved checks and review comments; keep related instead of closing because the better path still needs maintainer review.
Small focused Google Chat feature/fix PR is independent of this mixed inventory shard and should remain open for maintainer review.
Security-boundary-shaped UI rendering PR is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
